channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Resistance training linked to lower type 2 diabetes risk
item.description: Resistance training among US health professionals was associated with reduced type 2 diabetes risk, especially when performed consistently.

item.title: Cognitive rehabilitation helps long-COVID brain fog
item.description: The therapy helps patients achieve small but meaningful goals, such as reading for 20 minutes several times a week or completing short work tasks.

item.title: Pediatric cancer survival gains uneven in 2000s
item.description: A large database study found overall improvement in 5- and 10-year pediatric cancer survival, but some cancers and demographic groups lag behind.

item.title: Porcine corneal grafts may address donor shortages
item.description: Porcine corneal grafts offer a potential solution to donor cornea shortages, but researchers call for larger studies to confirm safety and long-term outcomes.
